global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with various text elements and shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting new music hits with a call to action.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and energetic feel.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center with a light green shade, featuring abstract shapes like circles and rectangles.

elements.label: Secondary content area
elements.description: Another rectangular area slightly overlapping the main content, showcasing more abstract shapes in a lighter tone.

elements.label: Text area
elements.description: A small rectangular area containing text, positioned centrally, with a dark font against the lighter background.

elements.label: Additional text area
elements.description: A small circular area with text, located towards the bottom of the main content area.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, dark text stating 'Stream the hype New hits every week', prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo text 'MoonScreen' positioned at the top left corner in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom center with the text 'Book now' in a bold font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' located at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, promoting new music.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, with the logo at the top left and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype New hits every week, MoonScreen, Book now, UGC
